notes: Intro video plays, menu screen works, but "new game" does nothing. Did all of the below - disabled esync, installed winetricks, corefonts, and vcrun2015, problem still persists.
title: Star Control®: Origins

notes: This version of proton downloads corefonts and vcrun2015 by itself. Disabling Esync is the only thing that needs to be done manually. The game seems to running perfectly, though I noticed some framerate drops in hyperspace and while exploring certain planets. Reducing graphics settings helped.
title: Star Control®: Origins

notes: Game seems to start perfectly, but it fails when attempting to play a new game, with a prompt appearing for a split second, then vanishing. I tried for 5 hours to get this game working, but vc2015, vc2019, etc, didn't work even when properly installed. No windows version changes worked,  and all in all, it just will not run on my configuration.
title: Star Control®: Origins

notes:
How to run: Used the Gog Version, simply ran Proton 4.11 

$ '/home/$(user)/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.11/dist/bin/wine' StarControl_Dx11.exe

from the starcon:origins directory. Played the full game, finished it. 


Performance: on an rx570-8g and a ryzen 2700, the performance was great. I played 1080p 8xAA and it only stuttered once during the final boss battle.

Nothing too special, but didn't work when using the steam launcher, had to use the command line. I'm sure there's a tweak somewhere to fix that.
title: Star Control®: Origins

notes: New game don't start. Can read the codex only. Mscorefonts installed, vcrun2015 cannot installed(error), esync disable.
title: Star Control®: Origins

notes:
Installed protontricks and with that installed vcrun2017. Then it works. By default the new game doesn't work. Protontricks: https://github.com/Sirmentio/protontricks

Command to run after installing Protontricks:
protontricks 271260 vcrun2017
title: Star Control®: Origins
